first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the core reasoning remains unchanged. Both evaluations correctly identify the same set of missing critical qualifications. The minor differences in wording and the specific concern highlighted in the summary list are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce new logic or key off the change in location from Berlin to Bucharest.
